AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Ruthless Sergeant
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] would dispatch her least capable subordinates to swift deaths, like tossing a piece of deadwood into a bonfire.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Outworld Cavalrywoman
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] acts as an alien ecologist. What she rides is no 'horse,' but an extraterrestrial beast that happens to look like one.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Death-Seeking Infantrywoman
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] is the most reckless soul anyone could ever imagine. She will respawn at the rally point 5 seconds after the battle begins.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Ostracized Drummer
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] is left to handle all the chores that everyone else is too lazy to bother with. After all, only the uncoolest misfits in the regiment carry an instrument instead of a rifle or a saber.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Obsessive Gunner
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] dreams of trajectories, eyes her dinner pot as potential ammunition, and plots firing positions while marching.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Indefatigable Sapper
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] mines saltpeter, clears paths, and constructs fortifications. She does not love the labor; she does it because only sappers are allowed to wear funny fake beards.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Mooching Aristocrat
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] brags that her aunt’s servant's dog trainer’s sister’s boss is an officer in the General Staff.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Benevolent Nun
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] insists on providing medical aid to annelitrice who absolutely do not need it. Frontline troops would kill themselves to respawn than risk falling into her clutches.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Dependable Gunsmith
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: In an army made up of vagrants and lunatics, the gunsmith must be at least calm and honest, if they want the cannons to cook off a few less times.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Piquette Vivandière
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef]'s predecessor was reassigned to clean the stables after refusing to supply the frontline troops with their only viable ration.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Dutiful Chef
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] does her utmost to scavenge anything that can be thrown into the cauldron, occasionally pushing her luck in the infirmary. Yes, it’s exactly what you’re thinking.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Misplaced Peasant
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] remains under the impression that this is the Ahmislan medieval fantasy theme, mistaking the firearm for a magic staff that casts fire.
